name: &CThe Center of Second Street&n
description:
&n   Here is a big and calm place, calmer than the square to the north, that is.
You see all types of people here, beggars, drunks, prostitutes... you'd better
watch out for your wallet here.
&n   &RThe New Market&n Square is to the north, while &CThe Bridge&n is to the south.
The &cSecond Street&n goes on to the east and to the west of here.
